lock_policy: Frozen before any router evaluation or compiler inspection on this dataset.
split_policy: High-lexical-shift model-generated challenge; no human authorship claim.

records.source_question: Which states have the highest average monthly premiums?
paraphrases: Rank states by mean premium charged per month, from greatest downward.

records.source_question: Which states have the highest median silver plan premiums?
paraphrases: For Silver-tier offerings, identify the states leading on the median premium.

records.source_question: How do average premiums differ by metal level?
paraphrases: Compare mean premium amounts across the metal-tier categories.

records.source_question: Which states have the most issuer competition?
paraphrases: Where is the state-level marketplace contested by the greatest number of issuers?

records.source_question: Which metal levels dominate plan availability?
paraphrases: Determine which metal tiers account for the largest supply of available plans.

records.source_question: What is the distribution of public quality rating statuses?
paraphrases: Break down records according to their publicly reported quality-rating status.

records.source_question: Which states experienced the largest PY2025 to PY2026 plan continuity changes?
paraphrases: Rank states by the magnitude of their plan-continuity shift between PY2025 and PY2026.

records.source_question: Which issuers have the worst plan continuity?
paraphrases: Identify the issuers whose plans exhibit the weakest continuity.

records.source_question: Which counties or service areas have limited issuer choices?
paraphrases: Locate counties or service regions where consumers face a narrow selection of issuers.

records.source_question: Which states show unusual premium variation?
paraphrases: Flag states whose premiums display anomalous dispersion.

records.source_question: Which benefit categories differ most across metal levels?
paraphrases: Across metal tiers, determine which benefit groupings vary the most.

records.source_question: Are higher quality ratings associated with higher premiums?
paraphrases: Assess whether premium amounts rise in association with stronger quality scores.

records.source_question: Which benefit categories have the highest coverage rate?
paraphrases: Rank benefit groupings by the proportion receiving coverage.

records.source_question: Which metal levels have the highest average deductibles?
paraphrases: Order metal tiers by mean deductible, highest first.

records.source_question: Which metal levels have the highest average out-of-pocket maximums?
paraphrases: Determine which metal tiers lead on the mean maximum member outlay.

records.source_question: Which issuers have the highest median silver premiums?
paraphrases: For Silver offerings, rank issuers by median premium from greatest to least.

records.source_question: Which states have the largest number of service-area counties with only one issuer?
paraphrases: Rank states by their count of counties in service areas served by a sole issuer.

records.source_question: Which issuers offer the most distinct plans?
paraphrases: Identify issuers with the broadest count of unique plan offerings.

records.source_question: Which states have the most distinct plans?
paraphrases: Find the states providing the greatest variety of unique plans.

records.source_question: Which rating areas have the highest median silver premium?
paraphrases: Among rating regions, locate those leading on the median premium for Silver coverage.

records.source_question: Which states have the largest Gold versus Silver average premium gap?
paraphrases: Rank states by the size of the difference between mean Gold and Silver premiums.

records.source_question: Within joined quality rows, which states have the highest average premium for rated plans?
paraphrases: Restricting analysis to matched quality records and rated offerings, find the states with the greatest mean premium.

records.source_question: Which issuers have the lowest benefit coverage rate?
paraphrases: Rank issuers from lowest upward by the proportion of benefits covered.

records.source_question: Which states have the highest share of new or not-in-crosswalk current plans?
paraphrases: Identify states where new plans or current offerings absent from the crosswalk constitute the greatest proportion.

records.source_question: Which metal levels have the widest interquartile premium range?
paraphrases: Determine which metal tiers exhibit the largest premium spread between their first and third quartiles.

records.source_question: Which state and county combinations have many plans but few issuers?
paraphrases: Find state–county pairs characterized by abundant plan offerings alongside a small issuer pool.

records.source_question: Do unrated plans differ in average deductible from rated plans?
paraphrases: Compare mean deductibles between plans lacking ratings and those carrying ratings.

records.source_question: Which plan types have the highest average out-of-pocket maximum?
paraphrases: Rank plan-type categories by mean ceiling on members’ out-of-pocket spending.

records.source_question: Which crosswalk reasons are most common?
paraphrases: Rank the stated crosswalk rationales by frequency.

records.source_question: Which benefits most often have quantity limits?
paraphrases: Identify the benefits for which quantity restrictions occur most frequently.
